title: Better Combat Conquest's Medieval Armors and Weapons Patch
description: Patch between Better Combat and Conquest's Medieval Armors and Weapons
body:
This mod is supposed do fix the incompatibilities between Conquest's Medieval Armors and Weapons and Better Combat
Some weapons were not recognised by better combat and were working as in vanilla, some minor tweaks for integration did the job

![](https://i.postimg.cc/3J2LvTKt/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-15-14-57-47-78.png)
